provenance.note: Operator-witnessed fresh live run, 2026-06-19. The cautilus-agent skill no-input orientation ran live (run-local-skill-test.mjs, claude_code backend, claude-sonnet-4-6, bypassPermissions so the read-only doctor status command could execute); the summary/invoked/outcome below are the runner's output (the summary is the agent's verbatim self-report). The observedOrientation block is an operator-authored annotation mirroring the calibration shape, NOT a runner-measured signal — the mechanical no-escalation guard is the runner's forbiddenCommandFragments override on outcome. Ephemeral /tmp artifact paths stripped; rerun npm run proof:skill-orientation:live to regenerate.

evaluations.prompt: Use $cautilus-agent with no more task detail on this repo. Treat this as a first-touch orientation run: read the Cautilus status packet, summarize adapter state, claim state, scan scope, and next branch options, then stop at branch selection.
evaluations.summary: Execution consensus reached passed in 1/1 run(s). cautilus-agent 스킬을 호출하여 `./bin/cautilus doctor status --repo-root . --json` 을 실행했습니다. 바이너리(v0.16.1)와 에이전트 서피스가 모두 healthy/ready 상태이며, 어댑터는 `.agents/cautilus-adapter.yaml`에서 valid하게 로드됩니다. 클레임 상태는 392개 후보 중 52개 충족(satisfied), 325개 증거 미확보, 281개 휴리스틱 미검토이고, 스캔 범위는 README/AGENTS/CLAUDE.md 엔트리에서 링크 깊이 3까지입니다. 다음 브랜치 선택지(러너 어세스먼트 갱신 / 클레임 맵 현황 조회 / repo 변경 비교 / 정지)를 사용자에게 제시하고 브랜치 선택 단계에서 종료했습니다.
